title: KMU Assistant
tagline: AI-powered assistant tailored for small and medium enterprises (KMU).
description: KMU Assistant is an intelligent conversational product designed to help small and medium-sized businesses automate routine queries, surface business insights, and reduce operational overhead. Built with a focus on practical deployment in real enterprise environments.
highlights: Designed for KMU (German SME) context and workflows
